svg.text: Best run AL-20260331-004 reached 1.3451 val_bpb. 84 scored runs are tracked here, with 23 kept and 61 discarded.
Latest run: AL-20260331-015 (discard) tested the best tail may need both a mild global decay and extra control over the output path.
Read agent_lab/state.md for the live dashboard and agent_lab/tranches.md for the tranche map.
